sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9412" key="a)nta/llaktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντάλλα-κτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9412.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taken as equivalent,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρός τι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:1:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.51</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
